observe_decisions.object_type_reasoning: The image contains retinal vessel branching patterns, which are characteristic of vessel trees.
observe_decisions.color_mode_reasoning: In fundoscopy images, color carries diagnostic information that can enhance feature extraction accuracy for vessel trees.
observe_decisions.filtration_reasoning: The bright vessels on a darker background require a superlevel filtration to effectively capture these bright-on-dark structures.

ph_signals.name: rich_topology
ph_signals.description: Very many PH features with H1-heavy profile — multi-scale structure
ph_signals.reasoning: Extremely rich PH diagrams (>20K features) with H1 emphasis contain multi-scale topological information. Persistence landscapes' layered representation captures different scales via different landscape levels.

ph_signals.name: low_persistence_signal
ph_signals.description: Very low average persistence in both H0 and H1 — PH is noisy
ph_signals.reasoning: When average persistence is very low in both dimensions, most PH features are noise (short-lived). Image-based descriptors that bypass PH entirely extract more reliable signal from pixel patterns.

observe_decisions.object_type_reasoning: The image contains retinal fundus structures where vessel branching and patterns are key features, typical of vessel trees.
observe_decisions.color_mode_reasoning: Color information in RGB channels is important for fundoscopy images to differentiate between various retinal features and pathologies.
observe_decisions.filtration_reasoning: Vessel structures typically appear brighter against the darker background of the retina, making superlevel filtration suitable for capturing these bright-on-dark features.

observe_decisions.object_type_reasoning: The IDRiD dataset focuses on retinal fundus images which typically contain vascular structures like retinal vessel branching.
observe_decisions.color_mode_reasoning: For retinal images, color can carry diagnostic information, particularly for fundoscopy, hence per-channel analysis can enhance feature extraction.
observe_decisions.filtration_reasoning: Retinal vessel trees are generally bright against a darker background, making superlevel filtration suitable to capture these structures effectively.
